Off Calendar Jul-03-2019 Continued To Jul-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justine Clisham for and with (petitioner) Pamela Clisham.

The Court stated that at the last hearing a cousin appeared via Court Call and indicated that she would be hiring counsel and asked if they have been notified of such. Ms. Clisham stated that they received an email from an attorney in San Francisco who appeared to be helping the cousin but not retained and that they provided copies of the wills but have not heard anything since. The Court granted the petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-22-2018 Continued To Oct-29-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-17-2018 Continued To Oct-22-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Clisham for and with Pamela Clisham (Petitioner).
Margaret Bromet appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

This was a pregranted matter. Ms. Bromet stated that she is the Decedent's first cousin, that she is objecting to the petition, that when she spoke with her Cousin she was told that she is in the will, and that the new will was drafted shortly prior her death and when her Cousin was close to death. Ms. Bromet also stated that she lives in New York and will be hiring an Attorney in San Francisco, that she will be filing a formal will contest within 60-days, that the family intent was there, and questions why she was not contacted when her Cousin was very ill or when she died. Ms. Clisham stated that she was a neighbor and best friends with Della since 1969, that she never heard of Margaret and that's why she did not contact her. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to October 22, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Bromet to hire an Attorney and file her objections. The Court informed the Parties that he and Mr. Clisham were in the same office 30 years ago or so.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
